content.problemStatement:
Two friends Chef and Chefina are currently on floors AAA and BBB respectively. They hear an announcement that prizes are being distributed on the ground floor and so decide to reach the ground floor as soon as possible.

Chef can climb down XXX floors per minute while Chefina can climb down YYY floors per minute. Determine who will reach the ground floor first (ie. floor number 0). In case both reach the ground floor together, print `Both`.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
The first line of each test case contains four space-separated integers AAA, BBB, XXX, and YYY — the current floor of Chef, the current floor of Chefina, speed of Chef and speed of Chefina in floors per minute respectively.


Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line:



`Chef` if Chef reaches the ground floor first.
`Chefina` if she reaches the ground floor first.
`Both` if both reach the ground floor at the same time.

You may print each character of the string in uppercase or lowercase. For example, the strings `CHEF`, `chef`, `Chef`, and `chEF` are all considered the same.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: Chef is on the second floor and has a speed of 222 floors per minute. Thus, Chef takes 111 minute to reach the ground floor. Chefina is on the second floor and and has a speed of 222 floors per minute. Thus, Chefina takes 111 minute to reach the ground floor. Both Chef and Chefina reach the ground floor at the same time.
Test case 222: Chef is on the fourth floor and has a speed of 111 floor per minute. Thus, Chef takes 444 minute to reach the ground floor. Chefina is on the second floor and and has a speed of 555 floors per minute. Thus, Chefina takes 0.40.40.4 minutes to reach the ground floor. Chefina reaches the ground floor first.
Test case 333: Chef is on the third floor and has a speed of 444 floors per minute. Thus, Chef takes 0.750.750.75 minutes to reach the ground floor. Chefina is on the second floor and and has a speed of 111 floor per minute. Thus, Chefina takes 222 minutes to reach the ground floor. Chef reaches the ground floor first.
Test case 444: Chef is on the third floor and has a speed of 222 floors per minute. Thus, Chef takes 1.51.51.5 minutes to reach the ground floor. Chefina is on the second floor and and has a speed of 111 floor per minute. Thus, Chefina takes 222 minutes to reach the ground floor. Chef reaches the ground floor first.
